title: Add canary marker module
description: Create the dependency-free ESM module for FR-001 and keep existing project behavior unchanged for FR-002, NFR-001, NFR-002, and NFR-003. This task is sized for less than 60 minutes and only modifies the new marker file.
acceptance_criteria: src/canary-marker.js exists and exports a named canaryMarker function.
Inspection of src/canary-marker.js shows a literal constant-time return and no I/O, environment access, timers, randomness, logging, dynamic marker construction, or runtime dependencies.
npm test exits 0 with the existing script, and scoped diff inspection shows src/index.js and package.json remain unchanged.
